title: Halloween!!
detail_text: <:th_ch0002/>We were talking about doing a Halloween party at school, right?<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0103/>Yeah, it was definitely about that<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0002/>Then why! Why is everyone wearing a costume and hiding in various places in school to scare us!?<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0103/>Maybe it’s a haunted house kind of thing.... But it’s already October.... Also, it’s Halloween! Halloween isn’t that kind of event, right!?<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0002/>That’s right, it’s about trick or treating, right? Everything should be okay if you give them sweets, right?<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0103/>The black cat Rin-chan just now was cute, but something like the Shizuku-chan one was tough.... A drama club member with a costume is quite something if they get serious....<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0002/>That’s true, also.... Kyaaah!<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0103/>Nooooo! What, what is it!?<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0002/>I’m sorry, it was my own footsteps.... H-, hey, isn’t it a little cold? If you’d like, I could warm your hands up, you know?<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0103/>No no no, you’re cold too, right, Eli-chan? I’ll warm you up, so lend me your hand. Umm, don’t let go, okay....?<:dt_line_end/><:th_ch0000/>Translated by SIFAStheatre and Idol Story<:dt_line_end/>
